milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in data scientist to build a strong learning foundation

resources.title: Data Science Professional Certificate Programs on Coursera
Data Science & Machine Learning Bootcamps on Udemy
Data Science Professional Certificate Programs on edX
Google Data Analytics and Advanced Data Analytics Professional Certificates
Data Analysis with Python Certification on freeCodeCamp

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in python (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn), machine learning algorithms, and statistical modelling — these are the essential building blocks for a data scientist

resources.title: Data Science, Python, and Machine Learning Fundamentals Courses on Coursera
Python Libraries for Data Science Tutorials on freeCodeCamp (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn)
Machine Learning Algorithms & Statistical Modeling Courses on Udemy
SQL and Database Fundamentals on Khan Academy
Practical Data Science Projects and Tutorials on YouTube (Python, Pandas, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib)

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in data visualisation, sql and databases, and feature engineering, applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: Advanced Python Data Visualization Courses on Coursera
Advanced SQL and Database Tutorials on freeCodeCamp
Advanced Feature Engineering for Machine Learning Courses on Udemy
Advanced Data Science Programs and Courses on edX (covering SQL, Visualization, Feature Engineering)
YouTube Tutorials: Advanced Python Data Visualization Techniques

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing data analysis projects, research studies, or analytical reports using real-world datasets — focus on applying python (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn), and machine learning algorithms in realistic scenarios

resources.title: Coursera Search: Data Science & Machine Learning Projects with Python
Udemy Search: Real-World Data Science & ML Projects with Python
edX Search: Hands-on Data Science & ML Projects
YouTube Search: Data Science Project Tutorials (Python)
GitHub Search: Data Science Projects with Python

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a portfolio of analytical projects: publish notebooks on Kaggle or GitHub, create data visualizations, and document your methodology and findings

resources.title: data scientist Portfolio Building on Coursera
data scientist Portfolio Building on Udemy
data scientist Portfolio Building on YouTube

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your data scientist skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: data scientist CV / Profile Building on Coursera
data scientist CV / Profile Building on Udemy
data scientist CV / Profile Building on YouTube

milestones.title: Job Application / Freelancing
milestones.description: Apply for data scientist positions through job boards, company career pages, professional networks, and industry-specific platforms — tailor each application and prepare to discuss your hands-on experience and portfolio in interviews
